## Summary

Provide a concise summary of the change and the user-facing impact.

## Motivation

Explain why this change is needed.

## Changes

- List the key implementation changes.
- Include architecture or behavior notes when relevant.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Other checks (describe below)

Describe exactly what you ran and the outcomes.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title and body are written in English.
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed).
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-visible change).
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered.
